title: Calendly Scheduled Event
description: A scheduled event represents a booked meeting in Calendly with a specific start time, end time, location, host memberships, and associated invitees.

uri.description: The canonical URI of the scheduled event resource.

name.description: The name of the scheduled event, inherited from the event type.

status.description: The current status of the scheduled event.

start_time.description: The start time of the event in UTC (ISO 8601 format).

end_time.description: The end time of the event in UTC (ISO 8601 format).

event_type.description: The URI of the event type this event was created from.

event_memberships.description: The list of users who are members (hosts) of this event.

event_guests.description: Additional guests invited to the event beyond the primary invitee.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the event was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the event was last updated.

Location.description: The location configuration for a scheduled event, specifying where the meeting takes place.

location.description: The location details such as a physical address, phone number, or custom location string.

join_url.description: The URL to join the meeting for virtual conference locations.

status.description: The status of conference link generation (e.g., initiated, processing, pushed, failed).

additional_info.description: Additional information about the location provided by the host.

InviteesCounter.description: A count of invitees by status for the scheduled event.

limit.description: The maximum number of invitees allowed for the event.

Cancellation.description: Information about the cancellation of an event or invitee.

canceled_by.description: The name or identifier of the person who canceled.

reason.description: The reason provided for the cancellation.

canceler_type.description: Whether the host or the invitee canceled the event.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the cancellation occurred.

EventMembership.description: A user who is a member (host) of a scheduled event.

user.description: The URI of the user who is a host of the event.

user_email.description: The email address of the event host.

user_name.description: The name of the event host.

EventGuest.description: An additional guest invited to a scheduled event.

email.description: The email address of the guest.

created_at.description: When the guest was added to the event.

updated_at.description: When the guest record was last updated.
